case_title: THE BELLA UNION VS. JET BLACK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY THE BELLA UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, JET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2009 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-09-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES TO AGREE ON A PAYMENT PLAN. DEFENDANT APPEARED WITH ALL HER FINANCIALS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BELLA UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACK, JET $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,137.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
